title: deschampsia cespitosa subsp. sukatschewii
intro: Deschampsia cespitosa subsp. sukatschewii, also known as Manchurian hair grass, is a type of perennial grass native to East Asia and the Russian Far East. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Deschampsia cespitosa subsp. sukatschewii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Deschampsia cespitosa subsp. sukatschewii is often prepared as a tincture or tea in herbal medicine, and its roots and rhizomes are used to make infusions and decoctions.
